data.body:
Compared DSO's planning-review criteria (~/dso_planning_criteria_report.md, digital-service-orchestra @ 2e9eaf4a44) against rebar's plan-review gate (docs/plan-review-gate.md, src/rebar/llm/plan_review/). Full report at ~/dso_rebar_plan_review_gap_report.md, published as Artifact https://claude.ai/code/artifact/a3f2069a-e882-4aa0-99be-bca19ed81b4d.

Synthesis preserves rebar's multi-pass severity-free-finder + typed-binary-verifier + deterministic-decide architecture as intentionally superior (DSO's own bug history — untrusted self-scored status fields, score inflation, skipped gates — validates it).

Gaps DSO catches that rebar doesn't: G-1 no conflict detection between findings; G-2 no oscillation detection across re-review rounds (sidecar norm_id history enables it); G-3 verify-command defect taxonomy + behavioral-command blacklist (grep/ls/cat/test -f = file inspection, not behavior); G-4 OUT-assertion/scope-exclusion false preconditions; G-5 behavioral-prohibition consumer scan; G-6 in-flight cross-ticket interaction scanning; G-7 inference-signal provenance lexicon when no session log linked; G-8 T3 command-surface empiricism (per-command --help, endpoint granularity, env preconditions); G-9 scale grounding + upward-interpolation prohibition; G-10 CI-trigger/release-infra coverage audit; G-11 G3 three-part coverage standard + bypass-annotation patterns; G-12 prompt-injection directive missing from reviewer prompts.

FP-avoidance transfers to Pass 2: new verifier binary respects_artifact_altitude; restatement gloss on no_existing_mitigation; already-standard-practice check; ambiguity-not-absence framing (T5c/T10); one-way blast-radius ratchet.

Reliability: chunk-contamination calibration for the blocking seven (R-1); double-verification agreement for block-crossing findings (R-2); document asymmetric-error directions (R-3); bug-history citations in rubrics (R-4); registry-generated authoring companion (R-5); affirmative-framing audit of packaged prompts (R-6).

Adoption plan: P0 prompt-only (injection directive, verifier binary, G3 standard, E4 lexicon, E6/A1/G6/T5a/T3 enrichments); P1 small code (P6 DET blacklist, conflict pass, oscillation signal, G1G2 prohibition mode, 3 new coach moves, docs); P2 experiments (chunk isolation, double-verify, cross-ticket criterion, T10/T12 CI audit).

Note: an earlier copy of this entry was appended in error to unrelated session log c905-a38c-0419-448e (stale current-log pointer) before rotating to this log.
